input_text: Elephants have probably no trunks. Until Sara arrived, John waited. The tail of the dog of Mary was short. Riga is not in Estonia. Penguins do not fly. Any person is male or female. Muggles can not disappear. A very big mouse is nice. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Dr. Smith, a surgeon, entered the room. Sue is a true patriot. The tree was cut by the farmer. A village road was narrow. The window was broken. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. The child wearing a hat ran. This book is more interesting than that one. Daniel journeyed to the office. The teacher showed the students a large map. The horse kept in the stable was calm. The man standing by the door coughed. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 10 percent. Anna handed Mark a silver key. The city was destroyed. Clinton defeated Dole. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. The stone was red. Tom wanted to leave. The picture was painted by Leo. Agatha is in trouble. Emily is a wolf. Mr Dursley is a catholic. The child wore a coat?
